characters.name: Alter Users
characters.description: Kazuma, with his Alter "Shell Bullet." Alter Users are people who have developed a power granting them the ability todeconstruct, reshape, and crystallize matter at a molecular level using only thought and willpower.These people have come to be known as "Alter" users. Only 1% (2% in the manga) of the newborn generations receives such special power, though this number rises steadily as the series progresses, and some feel a superiority over normal humans.

characters.name: Alter Users
characters.description: Kazuma, with his Alter "Shell Bullet." Only 1% (2% in the manga) of the newborn generations receives such special power, though this number rises steadily as the series progresses, and some feel a superiority over normal humans.

characters.name: Asuka Tachibana
characters.description: Asuka Tachibanais a member ofHOLYand rival ofKazuma. Asuka has short, purple hair, with the middle section of his bangs resting on his nose, and the rest above his eyes. His eyes are olive green. He can either be seen wearing the blue HOLY jacket and matching pants with black knee-length boots, or a red undershirt and beige coat. Asuka has a sweet demeanor when he's not fighting, but when conflict arises he becomes stern and professional. Early in the series, a bitter but unrequited rivalry with Kazuma rises after he is embarrassed by Kazuma during his escape from HOLD headquarters. Asuka has a sweet demeanor when he's not fighting, but when conflict arises he becomes stern and professional. Early in the series, a bitter but unrequited rivalry with Kazuma rises after he is embarrassed by Kazuma during his escape from HOLD headquarters. In the manga he is quite different in the beginning, he believed that the people in the Lost Ground deserved to suffer, since he lost his family to them, due to him being an Alter User. He also constanly makes perverse comments, such as his Eternity Eight being his balls & the like.

characters.name: Ayase Terada
characters.description: Alive (manga) Anative alterand close friend ofKimishima. Her alter ability is "Noble Tempest." When it is active, anything her hair touches turns into water and a small octopus alter takes the appearance of a hair ornament. She does not like to fight, but uses her power when she needs to. Later on, she gets captured and, under threat ofHOLYwithholding medical treatment from her brother, has her alter abilities refined extensively. This allows her to completely control water, cause chemical reactions with the elements in water and manifest a gargantuan alter by using a special conchlike apparatus hanging from a necklace. While battlingKazuma, she finds out her brother has died, and dies herself soon after, completely losing the will to live. In the manga, she marries Kimishima and they have a child together. In the anime, Ayase seemed to have taken a liking towards Kazuma, though it is not confirmed if she had the same feelings for Kimishima. Ayase using her power in episode 4 (her first appearance).

characters.name: Cammy
characters.description: Cammy is the romantic partner ofAsuka Tachibana. Cammy is a beautiful girl with a slender build. She has reddish-brown hair which she wears in twist braids she also has sky blue eye's, her outfit usually consists of an orange belly shirt with a white half coat with elbow length sleeves and she also wears brown shorts and a gold bracelet. Cammy Asuka's partner

Cammy Asuka's partner

characters.name: Dread Red
characters.description: A corrupt Native Alter who enslaved Kanami's village to hoard precious gems from the Earth in payment for his protection. Revealed to have been one of the Native Alters whom Kimishima had asked for assistance back in episode 6, Red declined, stating in episode 14 how lucky he was to have done so now that he is isolated from HOLD after the second uprising. He sets up a criminal organization and captures Inners as slave labor to dig up precious metals so he can soon escape out of the Lost Ground to safety. However, Ryuho disposes of Red without even using his full Alter power. His name is never revealed in his only episode appearance, except in the episode's ending credits. Delay Octopus Tentacles

characters.name: Dread Red

characters.name: Elian
characters.description: Elianis a member ofHOLY. For the most part, Elian seems to be rather stoic, rarely showing emotions. He does seem to enjoy using his Alter for HOLD. The eyes and ears of HOLY, Elian is the cloned son of Martin Zigmarl; though the fact of such remains unknown until much later. Elian's Alter allows him to create and control electronic devices that can allow him to observe anyone or anyplace over large areas and is often referred to as "Absolute Perception". It is heavily implied that this Alter is a product of refinement and not a natural Alter, which could also be said of Elian himself, being a clone. He plays a relatively small role, though his information gathered is incredibly crucial in many key scenes. Toward the end of the series, Kyoji Mujo even uses more twin clones of Zigmarl, who are known as Elian 3 and 4, to control the mass areas of the HOLY HQ after it is reformed. For the most part, Elian seems to be rather stoic, rarely showing emotions. He does seem to enjoy using his Alter for HOLD.
characters.personality_section: For the most part, Elian seems to be rather stoic, rarely showing emotions. He does seem to enjoy using his Alter for HOLD.

characters.name: George Tatsunami
characters.description: George Tatsunamiis a member ofHOLY. George has blonde hair and is seen wearing his HOLY jacket. George is a dangerous lunatic, always exploiting his alter power to bend people to his will. His heavy-handed tactics have earned him a bad reputation among the Inners of theLost Ground, and he is known for his very short temper and itchy trigger finger. In the manga he kills a little girl who was an Alter User, using the excuse that she'd become a criminal later on, it's unknown if he actually believes this or is simply sadistic. characters.name: Hannish Lightning
characters.description: Hannish is one of, if not the, tallest individual in the entire s-CRY-ed series. He is a quiet individual, having barely any lines in the series. he generally has a very calm demeanor, very rarely showing any emotions. He is however, extremely protective of Akira. He cries when he uses his alter. Goland Massacre: Hannish's alter allows him to turns any & all parts of his body into artillery of some kind such as rockets, missiles, etc. He can either turn just his arm into a cannon, to turning everything except his head into a weapon.

characters.name: HOLD
characters.description: HOLDfunctions as the Mainland government's super police force of the Lost Ground. HOLYis a subgroup of HOLD composed of skilled Alter Users. They serve as the "special operations" group, aiding HOLD in performing dangerous missions that might require the help of an Alter user. Nameless, faceless, hive-minded servants of HOLY, these masked soldiers, apart from looking identical, all possess an identical Alter power. At first, this power is the use of large, powerful, disembodied hands, often used to restrain other Alters. However, later Dars show variations of this power in the form of large ships and planes.

characters.name: Kanami Yuta
characters.description: One of the main protagonists,Kanami Yutais an eight-year-old girl that lives with Kazuma. She originally did not know about Alters or what Kazuma really did for a living, other than the money was rarely enough to financially support the both of them. Kanami truly loves him and continues to wait several years for Kazuma to return. Kanami is a young girl of average height and build with an average complexion, bluish-green eyes, and long, brown hair tied into a ponytail. Her usual outfit consists of an orange coat, pale lilac shorts, orange socks, brownish-red shoes and a red ribbon which she uses to tie up her long hair. Kanami is a determined-but-kind-hearted young girl who, despite being younger then Kazuma, is far more responsible then him in almost every way (especially with money). Kanami likes to tease Kazuma by calling him "Kazu-kun", which he's hated ever since they first met, and is one of the few people who can scold him whenever he does idiotic things. However, despite all these issues, Kanami is actually in love with Kazuma to the point where she's willing to wait years for him to return. characters.name: Kazuma Torisuna
characters.description: Kazumais the main protagonist character ofs-CRY-edand a Native Alter User. Kazuma is thought to not think before he acts, but this proves to be false. He does think, he just does so rather quickly. Kazuma has a unbreakable will, and he has proven that under no circumstances will he ever give up or admit defeat. This, combined with his headstrong manner, contributes to his bitter rivalry withRyuho. He obsesses over the prospect of defeating Ryuho, though ultimately, his feelings toward him change from enmity to respect. Kazuma is thought to not think before he acts, but this proves to be false. He does think, he just does so rather quickly. Kazuma has a unbreakable will, and he has proven that under no circumstances will he ever give up or admit defeat. This, combined with his headstrong manner, contributes to his bitter rivalry withRyuho. He obsesses over the prospect of defeating Ryuho, though ultimately, his feelings toward him change from enmity to respect. He claims to be a "selfish Alter user who will do anything for the right price", though this isn't the most accurate statement. He generally prefers Alter work to more mundane labor, and is poor with money. His supposed selfishness is very easy to call into question - he is financially charitable (perhaps detrimentally so), and has an attitude of challenging any foe and contesting any odds for the sake of protecting the innocent. Kazuma claims he doesn't have a last name on multiple occasions.

characters.name: Kunihiko Kimishima
characters.description: Kimishimais Kazuma's friend main source of cash, though he is quite a bit pompous and willingly ignorant. Kimishima also happens to be rather serious in his business, as when he first meets Kazuma, he tells him to trust him because if Kazuma fails, Kimishima was to die, which is proven true. He remains a noticeable and rather comical character all the way up until he dies in the anime as a result from a Hold and Holy operation to capture Kazuma using the Darths. It is a running joke in the series that his modes of transportation get destroyed in one way or another, usually at the hands of Kazuma. After his death, the scene in the opening where he is briefly shown is changed to a small montage. Kimishima's death is what pushed Kazuma over the edge and caused him to flip out and strike randomly at Holy, injuring Scheris and getting into a conflict with Ryuhou. Kazuma formed his Shell arm using Kimishima's gun and caused a door to the Alter Realm to open and caused Ryuhou and Kazuma to disappear for eight months. He's shown to be skilled with vehicles and guns.

He's shown to be skilled with vehicles and guns.

characters.name: Kyōji Mujō
characters.description: The primary antagonist of the series. While initially stated to be the Mainland's representative after theLost Groundchaotic second uprising, Mujo soon defects and becomes an independent and unstoppable renegade thanks to his own greed and endless thirst for the ultimate power, which he speaks of frequently as the "Other Side". This Alter User from the Mainland boasts extreme power over others with his ownAlter, merely called "Absorption". This power allows him to absorb the power of other living things and literally imagine a physical kind of Alter in any way he chooses, this is linked to his thirst for ultimate power, which he speaks of frequently. In episode 21, Mujo (he is often referred to by his last name) comes in contact with the "Other Side" after coaxingKazumaandRyuhoto once again open the door and manages to absorb the power of theCrystallized Alter Embodimentwhich had killed Ryuho's mother. This grants him a nearly unstoppable new power that he uses to reform HOLY HQ and that also allows him to summon the Embodiment as a stand alone Alter. Mujo can even use this ability to enhance his own body, with his favorite method being to use both the Embodiment's powerful black and white drill-like arms to himself, calling them "Black Joker" and "White Trick", and usually referring to them as Light and Darkness or Heaven and Hell. In episode 24, while his Alter Embodiment handles Ryuho, Mujo is defeated by Kazuma's ultimate Alter form and is forced to take refuge in "the Other Side". Thinking of themselves victorious, Kazuma and Ryuho reunite, only to be greeted by a monstrous new Kyoji Mujo, gleefully stating he has finally satisfied his unquenchable thirst for power at last. Armed with several new kinds of weapons, including some strange red lasers of some sort, he goes berserk, destroying even his own HQ just to kill both Kazuma and Ryuho. However, his merriment is quick to fade upon finding that his lasers have not even dented Kazuma or Ryuho's new Alter forms. Ryuho states that he's finally put the hatred of his past behind him and now it's Kazuma's turn. With a snicker, Kazuma casually strolls up to Mujo, taking several direct hits from his lasers without even flinching, stating that he cares nothing of the past or future, just about crushing any obstacle that currently stands before him. Mujo is mortified, nearly wailing with terror by that point as Kazuma finally delivers the finishing blow to the top of his head. His body slowly disintegrates before exploding into nothing. In the end, Mujo ends up losing the power he had so craved for his entire life in only a matter of seconds. Very little of his backstory was ever revealed, but it was stated that he grew up in the wastelands and willingly chose to be refined, due to his disgust of always living in the shadows of more "prosperous" Alter Users, such as Ryuho, and essentially all of HOLY as well, leading to his insatiable greed to possess absolutely everything possible.

Thinking of themselves victorious, Kazuma and Ryuho reunite, only to be greeted by a monstrous new Kyoji Mujo, gleefully stating he has finally satisfied his unquenchable thirst for power at last. Armed with several new kinds of weapons, including some strange red lasers of some sort, he goes berserk, destroying even his own HQ just to kill both Kazuma and Ryuho. However, his merriment is quick to fade upon finding that his lasers have not even dented Kazuma or Ryuho's new Alter forms. Ryuho states that he's finally put the hatred of his past behind him and now it's Kazuma's turn. With a snicker, Kazuma casually strolls up to Mujo, taking several direct hits from his lasers without even flinching, stating that he cares nothing of the past or future, just about crushing any obstacle that currently stands before him. Mujo is mortified, nearly wailing with terror by that point as Kazuma finally delivers the finishing blow to the top of his head. His body slowly disintegrates before exploding into nothing. In the end, Mujo ends up losing the power he had so craved for his entire life in only a matter of seconds. Very little of his backstory was ever revealed, but it was stated that he grew up in the wastelands and willingly chose to be refined, due to his disgust of always living in the shadows of more "prosperous" Alter Users, such as Ryuho, and essentially all of HOLY as well, leading to his insatiable greed to possess absolutely everything possible.

characters.name: Martin Zigmarl
characters.description: Martin Zigmarlis an alter user and a member of HOLY. In the anime, Zigmarl is a very noble man with strong convictions about his cause; hence the formation of HOLY, which was used to provide a safe haven for Alter users, who are constantly discriminated against by normal people, and the Mainland in particular. However, he is not above directly using his loyal followers to further his own goals, with the prime example being Ryuho. When Kyoji Mujo takes over HOLY, Zigmarl is usually in disdain whenever facing the man, and repeatedly lies to his face and secretly keeps his own agenda going to thwart the Mainland's goals. Zigamr's true appearance in the manga. In the anime, Zigmarl is a very noble man with strong convictions about his cause; hence the formation of HOLY, which was used to provide a safe haven for Alter users, who are constantly discriminated against by normal people, and the Mainland in particular. However, he is not above directly using his loyal followers to further his own goals, with the prime example being Ryuho. When Kyoji Mujo takes over HOLY, Zigmarl is usually in disdain whenever facing the man, and repeatedly lies to his face and secretly keeps his own agenda going to thwart the Mainland's goals. In the manga, however, Zigmarl's personality is noticeably just as, if not more so, demented as Kyoji Mujo's. His face is nothing but a front, as in reality is revealed to be a pretty boy at 19 years of age. His Alter is both the "Human Warp", to which, as its name implies, allows him to teleport wherever he so chooses, and that of the powerful "Galan Du," with a noticeable similarity to the Crystallized Alter Embodiment from the Other Side in the anime. He is then killed by said Alter, who takes on the role as the primary villain throughout the final volume.

characters.name: Mimori Kiryu
characters.description: Age 17- Daughter of the family that funds HOLD and HOLY inScryed. She was born in the Lost Ground and moved away, but comes back at the start of the anime to be withRyuho. She works at HOLY as ascientist. An old flame of Ryuho's, she hopes to reunite with him. She's also extremely idealistic and gentle, helping virtually all of the other cast members at some point or other. In addition, Mimori is opposed to violence in any way shape or form. She first appears in Episode 1. Later on Mimori does reunite with Ryuho and thinks he has changed drastically since their last meeting. Later, they talk and she finds out that he really never changed. Mimori asks Ryuho if she is important to him. Ryuho holds her hand and says she is, that he had only behaved coldly towards her and tried to send her away because he wanted to keep her safe. Mimori began to cry tears of joy and holds the pendant he gave her. In the manga, she is a medical officer ofLAWLESS. But her history is still the same for the most part, however at some point they were lovers, where in the anime they haven't seen each since they were kids. In the end she and Ryuho agree to go their separate ways. And appears to accept that Scheris will start a relationship with him.

characters.name: Native Alter User
characters.description: The Native Alter Users areAlter Usersof the area in theLost GroundthatHOLDand HOLY surround. They are Alter Users that go on using their Alters and causing trouble. In an imminent sense, they are the Alters Users that rebel against society and HOLD/HOLY.

characters.name: Rei Yuuki
characters.description: Rei Yuuki is an alter user of Super HOLY, who is very proud of his alter. He went up against Hannish Lightning and quickly lost against his Goland Massacre after refusing to surrender. Pela Tela. Pela Tela:Rei's alter allows him to generate a large number of tough webs to bind opponents.

characters.name: Rei Yuuki
characters.description: Rei Yuuki is an alter user of Super HOLY, who is very proud of his alter. He went up against Hannish Lightning and quickly lost against his Goland Massacre after refusing to surrender. Pela Tela. Pela Tela:Rei's alter allows him to generate a large number of tough webs to bind opponents.

characters.name: Ririri
characters.description: Riri was a native alter user with a good deal of influence and wealth. She traveled in a giant mobile pyramid, filled with men who served her. Her personality is self-obsessed as she gladly killed a large number of people to retain her youth, including young children. She had a very high opinion of herself, describing herself as brainy, radiant, having a vicious wit, along with being a woman of wealth, beauty, and eternal power and having the world at her feet. She was also seductive and tried to get Kazuma to work for her. She then tries to kill Kazuma after he refused to work for her and got furious when he gave her a cut with a headbutt. She was fairly curvaceous and wore little clothing, aside from some jewelry. He alter is soon destroyed by Ryuho, which causes her to age to the point she became an aged corpse. Male Mantis Female Mantis

characters.name: Ryūhō Ryu
characters.description: Ryuhois a member ofHOLYand a main character inS-CRY-ed. Ryuho cares most about insuring order, which leads him to sound cold and often being alone. His biggest rival is Kazuma, who has changed his personality drastically. Born and raised in the Lost Ground, Ryuho lived the first years of his life in a cautious but generally good-natured manner. Born into high society, he was to become the heir to the vast Ryu fortune his family had built after the Uprising. However, fate would deal him a series of cruel curve balls. Ryuho cares most about insuring order, which leads him to sound cold and often being alone. His biggest rival is Kazuma, who has changed his personality drastically.
characters.personality_section: Ryuho cares most about insuring order, which leads him to sound cold and often being alone. His biggest rival is Kazuma, who has changed his personality drastically.

characters.personality_section: Ryuho cares most about insuring order, which leads him to sound cold and often being alone. His biggest rival is Kazuma, who has changed his personality drastically.

characters.name: Scheris Adjani
characters.description: Scherisis the first Holy member seen in the series. She often works with Ryuho, if only to provide a mental balance, although it quickly becomes apparent that she has a crush on Ryuho. Although stated that she is an alter user in the first episode, she rarely uses her alter. She has short blue hair that stops at her ears, and wears a yellow and white triangle-shaped hair clip. She has light blue eyes and a peaceful look in her face. Her HOLY uniform has black sleeves with a yellow pentagon at the top. She has white gloves starting at her elbows and ending at her wrists. She wears a super short lavender and white dress that ends where her thighs start. She has black shorts underneath but is not seen over her dress. Scheris wears black knee-high socks and white and black officer boots. Scheris' civilian outfit. Scheris is very kind and considerate; a perfect foil to her partner Ryuho, whom she obviously has a crush on. Despite her cheeriness and laid-back attitude, she is serious about her duties as a HOLY member.

characters.name: Straight Cougar
characters.description: Straight Cougaris an alter user and a member of HOLY. Straight Cougar, in conjunction with his alter power, is a speed demon. His carefree and fun attitude is a sharp contrast to the more serious members of HOLY as he seems to annoy most of them with his constant trouble remembering names. Cougar is friendly and outgoing, but his crush on Mimori Kiryu remains unrequited. He also seems to get offended when he is called slow or he feels something is challenging his speed. Although his history remains unknown, Cougar has been called Kazuma's brother (this is later contradicted by Cougar himself when facing off against Kazuma in ep.18 and by Kazuma during his last stand off with Ryuho). This could just be that at one point during his life he lived outside the walls of the Lost Ground and may have been an strong influence on Kazuma. Straight Cougar, in conjunction with his alter power, is a speed demon. Cougar is friendly and outgoing, but his crush on Mimori Kiryu remains unrequited. He also seems to get offended when he is called slow or he feels something is challenging his speed.

characters.name: T.T.
characters.description: T.T. is an alter user who is a member of Super HOLY who is obsessed with knowledge. He used his alter to mentally breakScherisand turn her into his puppet. He later attempted to do the same toRyuho. After he failed, he was severely beaten up. He is very perverted, considering the outfit he put Scheris in after he broke her. Viva Knowledge Viva Knowledge:This alter is shaped like a brain in a bulb with antennas on it. It has a large number of cables to bind opponents. It access peoples’ memories and computer databanks, then send the information into T.T.’s mind.

characters.name: T.T.
characters.description: T.T. is an alter user who is a member of Super HOLY who is obsessed with knowledge. He used his alter to mentally breakScherisand turn her into his puppet. characters.name: Taiki Aono
characters.description: Taiki Aono is an member of the illustrious "Super HOLY". He is supposedly the older brother of Kazuma as both share the same birthmark on their right hands (to which is stated why Kazuma wears his glove to cover it). Akira describes Taiki's alter. Shield of Distortion: A "familiar"-style "Alter" manifestation. "Shield of Distortion" is a black lens with jagged edges, a pair of eerie eyes set on either side and a lens with a fluidic surface. This long-range "Alter" has the ability to manipulate the size of objects through the lens as a medium, thus either augmenting his own attacks dramatically or reducing the effects of opponents' attacks.

characters.name: Taiki Aono
characters.description: Taiki Aono is an member of the illustrious "Super HOLY". This long-range "Alter" has the ability to manipulate the size of objects through the lens as a medium, thus either augmenting his own attacks dramatically or reducing the effects of opponents' attacks.

characters.name: The Crystal
characters.description: The Crystalis a living Alter from the Alter dimension, drawn tothe Lost Groundduring the Great Uprising. It does not speak, instead merely moaning like a whale. Because it is made of Alter, the Crystal needs to absorb more Alter power just to exist, and accidentally killed Ryuhou's mother and dog during its first search. WhenKazumaenters theAlter forest, he meets and does battle with the Crystal, eventually tearing out its backbone. Though this does nothing to the Crystal, the shard of its body evolves Kazuma's Alter to its second level. After being absorbed by Kyouji Mujo, it is used by him to fight Ryuhou, and is defeated by Ryuhou's final Alter form. The Crystal has a white left arm and a black right arm, dubbed "White Trick" and "Black Joker" by Mujo. The arms can transform into drills to attack. The Crystal has the power to control lighting, either condensing it into compact orbs which can be fired as projectiles or using it to restrain its victims. The villain in the manga, Galan Du, is more or less the same entity, though Galan Du can talk and isMartin Zigmarl'sAlter in the manga. The Crystal appears humanoid, made of black, fiery energy covered in bone-like or metallic armor. Its right arm is armored black while its left arm is armored white. On its chest is a red sphere positioned on the left side, a blue sphere on its waist surrounded on either side by armored sections, forming a belt of sorts, and a small, yellow sphere on its forehead. Unlike its manga counterpart Galan Du, The Crystal seems to have a stoic personality, neither showing signs of rage or satisfaction with the events happening around it or actions it takes. This could be due to it being an extra-dimensional entity. In essence, its reactions are too alien for humans to understand, and in turn, the situation and stimulus may be too alien for it to process correctly. Unlike its manga counterpart Galan Du, The Crystal seems to have a stoic personality, neither showing signs of rage or satisfaction with the events happening around it or actions it takes. This could be due to it being an extra-dimensional entity. In essence, its reactions are too alien for humans to understand, and in turn, the situation and stimulus may be too alien for it to process correctly.

characters.name: Zetsuei (Alter)
characters.description: Zetsueiis the name ofRyūhō's Alter, named after his late Doberman that was used as material to first form it. Whenthe Crystallized embodiment of Alter energyshowed up and attacks Ryūhō, his mother and his dog, Zetsuei, it kills his mother and dog. The anger over this loss causes his Alter power to be unleashed. His dog atomizes and in its place was the humanoid being that would follow him for the rest of his life: Zetsuei. As an Independent Alter, Zetsuei's primary fucntion enables it to think for itself when not obeying the will of Ryūhō. According to Ryūhō, Zetsuei's power is boundless because of its ability to control itself.

characters.name: Zetsuei (Alter)
characters.description: Zetsueiis the name ofRyūhō's Alter, named after his late Doberman that was used as material to first form it. Whenthe Crystallized embodiment of Alter energyshowed up and attacks Ryūhō, his mother and his dog, Zetsuei, it kills his mother and dog. The anger over this loss causes his Alter power to be unleashed. His dog atomizes and in its place was the humanoid being that would follow him for the rest of his life: Zetsuei. As an Independent Alter, Zetsuei's primary fucntion enables it to think for itself when not obeying the will of Ryūhō. According to Ryūhō, Zetsuei's power is boundless because of its ability to control itself.
